'''shazhomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabadi|kabadi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabadi|kabadi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shazhomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhemeth|shæzhemeth]] || [[word:shæzhemej|shæzhemej]] || [[word:shæzhemesh|shæzhemesh]] || [[word:shæzheme|shæzheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhozhomoth|shazhozhomoth]] || [[word:shazhozhomoj|shazhozhomoj]] || [[word:shazhozhomosh|shazhozhomosh]] || [[word:shazhozhomo|shazhozhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhomoth|shazhomoth]] || [[word:shazhomoj|shazhomoj]] || [[word:shazhomosh|shazhomosh]] || [[word:shazhomo|shazhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhofmofth|shazhofmofth]] || [[word:shazhofmofj|shazhofmofj]] || [[word:shazhofmofsh|shazhofmofsh]] || [[word:shazhofmof|shazhofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhomotho|shazhomotho]] || [[word:shazhomojo|shazhomojo]] || [[word:shazhomosho|shazhomosho]] || [[word:shazhomoko|shazhomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhomoth|shazhomoth]] || [[word:shazhomoj|shazhomoj]] || [[word:shazhomosh|shazhomosh]] || [[word:shazhomo|shazhomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhomothol|shazhomothol]] || [[word:shazhomojol|shazhomojol]] || [[word:shazhomoshol|shazhomoshol]] || [[word:shazhomokol|shazhomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhomoothotho|shazhomoothotho]] || [[word:shazhomoojojo|shazhomoojojo]] || [[word:shazhomooshosho|shazhomooshosho]] || [[word:shazhomooko|shazhomooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhomothon|shazhomothon]] || [[word:shazhomojon|shazhomojon]] || [[word:shazhomoshon|shazhomoshon]] || [[word:shazhomokon|shazhomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhomothooro|shazhomothooro]] || [[word:shazhomojooro|shazhomojooro]] || [[word:shazhomoshooro|shazhomoshooro]] || [[word:shazhomokooro|shazhomokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
